chunks.text: Tom and I stayed in the classroom to talk about our favorite season.
I think that summer is my favorite season
because I love going to the sea and the mountains.
But Tom did not agree with me.
Cherry flowers are so beautiful,” he said.
When summer comes, my family always goes to the sea.
While my brother plays baseball, I quietly read books at home.
Although it is sometimes rainy, summer is still a lot of fun.
If tomorrow is sunny, I will go to the beach with my family again.
